scripts.check:prebuild: node scripts/check-image-credits.js && node scripts/check-meta-quality.js && node scripts/generate-tool-data.js && node scripts/generate-search-index.js
scripts.check:postbuild: node scripts/check-indexing-quality.js && node scripts/check-content-quality.js && node scripts/check-html-structure.js && node scripts/check-rendered-seo.js
scripts.check:site: npm run check:prebuild && npm run check:postbuild
scripts.build: npm run check:prebuild && next build && npm run check:postbuild
scripts.build:fast: node scripts/generate-tool-data.js && node scripts/generate-search-index.js && next build
scripts.deploy: echo "Cloudflare Pages deploys the out directory automatically after npm run build."
